summary: Meeting Minutes Module v2 - All tests passed. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - full page views (not side panels), textareas with rows=3, auto-task creation working, edit history tracking, filters working.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug: meeting_minutes.py was using db.tasks_v2 (global) instead of get_tenant_db().tasks_v2 (tenant-scoped) for task creation. This caused tasks to be created but not visible via the task-management API.
seed_data_creation: Test meetings created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting Minutes module v2 fully tested. Key changes from v1: 1) Full page views instead of side panels - detail at /meeting-minutes/:id, edit at /meeting-minutes/:id/edit, new at /meeting-minutes/new. 2) Textareas with rows=3 for discussion points and action items. 3) Auto-task creation: action items auto-create tasks in tasks_v2 collection with linked_entity_type='meeting' and linked_entity_id=meeting_id. Task API is at /api/task-management/tasks/{task_id} (NOT /api/tasks/{task_id}). 4) Edit history tracked with edited_by, edited_by_name, edited_at fields.

Backend_API_Tests.POST_create_meeting_with_action_items_cr: PASSED - Tasks auto-created in tasks_v2 with task_id and task_number
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_update_meeting_with_new_action_items: PASSED - New action items get tasks created
Backend_API_Tests.PUT_update_meeting_tracks_edit_history: PASSED - edit_history array populated with edited_by_name and edited_at
Backend_API_Tests.Multiple_updates_accumulate_edit_history: PASSED - Each update adds entry to edit_history

Frontend_UI_Tests.Filters_section_visible: PASSED - month, year, periodicity, purpose, participant filters found
Frontend_UI_Tests.New_meeting_form_has_textareas: PASSED - <TEXTAREA> with rows=3 for discussion points
Frontend_UI_Tests.Detail_page_shows_all_sections: PASSED - minutes, actions, participants, stats sections found
Frontend_UI_Tests.Action_items_show_task_number: PASSED - TASK-00033 visible in detail and edit views

bug_fixed.issue: Tasks created from meeting action items were not visible via /api/task-management/tasks/{task_id}
bug_fixed.root_cause: meeting_minutes.py was using db.tasks_v2 (global database) instead of get_tenant_db().tasks_v2 (tenant-scoped database wrapper)
bug_fixed.fix: Changed from 'from database import db' to 'from database import db, get_tenant_db' and used tdb = get_tenant_db() in _create_tasks_for_action_items function
bug_fixed.verification: All 12 backend tests pass, tasks now visible via task-management API
